name: quickwork
title: QuickWork
description: Send tagged text messages to Feishu via user identity with auto token refresh.
author: thomas

commands.name: send-feishu-message
commands.title: Qw
commands.description: Send a tagged text message to Feishu group by user identity with auto refresh

arguments.name: body
arguments.placeholder: 输入正文，后缀可写 #前缀（例：今天总结 #日报）

commands.name: authorize-feishu
commands.title: Authorize Feishu
commands.description: Open OAuth page, auto capture code, and save refreshed tokens

preferences.name: feishuAppId
preferences.title: Feishu App ID
preferences.description: App ID used to refresh user token (e.g. cli_xxx)

preferences.name: feishuAppSecret
preferences.title: Feishu App Secret
preferences.description: App Secret used to refresh user token

preferences.name: feishuUserRefreshToken
preferences.title: Feishu User Refresh Token
preferences.description: User refresh token used to obtain access token automatically

preferences.name: feishuOAuthRedirectUri
preferences.title: Feishu OAuth Redirect URI
preferences.description: Must be configured in your app, e.g. http://127.0.0.1:14520/feishu-callback
